title: Add Student Progress Dashboard
requirement_excerpt:
# Requirement: Add Student Progress Dashboard

## Goal
Build a dashboard that shows progress by subject, topic, quiz score, and mastery level.

## Expected Outcome
- Dashboard page created
- API endpoint added if required
- Tests added
- Existing tests pass

## Constraints
- Use existing frontend layout
- Do not introduce a new UI library
- Do not change authentication flow

## Validation
- npm test passes
- npm run lint passes

tasks.title: Inspect codebase for UI/API patterns and data models
success_criteria: Identified existing layout components to wrap the dashboard.
Identified location and pattern for new API endpoints.
Mapped the data structures for subjects, topics, and scores.

tasks.title: Implement API endpoint for student progress data
success_criteria: API endpoint serves progress data including subject, topic, quiz scores, and mastery levels.
Unit tests for the API endpoint are passing.

tasks.title: Create Student Progress Dashboard UI component
success_criteria: Dashboard page created using existing frontend layout.
Dashboard displays progress by subject and topic.
Dashboard displays quiz scores and mastery levels correctly.

tasks.title: Verify integration and run full test suite
success_criteria: All new and existing tests pass.
Dashboard integration with API is confirmed functional.

tasks.title: Update progress documentation and cleanup
success_criteria: docs/progress.md reflects completion of the dashboard.
Any temporary research files are removed.
